title: Bulk County Preparation WhatIf
mission: Know Before You Go — Awareness Platform First, Route Intelligence Second

plannedActions.action: Acquire, extract, validate, and promote a county-owned boundary to assets/county-implementation/harris/boundary/harris-county-boundary.geojson under V809/V810 canonical boundary rules.
plannedActions.whatIfResult: Reported as a future candidate only; V816 performs no county preparation writes.

plannedActions.action: Prepare a runtime boundary registration only after the canonical boundary source is present and validated; do not activate the county.
plannedActions.whatIfResult: Reported only; V816 will not plan a runtime or protected-system write.

plannedActions.action: Prepare a non-operational runtime registration after asset prerequisites are complete; keep operational, productionEnabled, selectable, and safeToActivate false until separately authorized.
plannedActions.whatIfResult: Reported only; V816 will not plan a runtime or protected-system write.

existingToolsRequired.name: Census boundary source inventory
existingToolsRequired.purpose: Discover whether a canonical county boundary source is already staged.

existingToolsRequired.name: County boundary validation harness
existingToolsRequired.purpose: Validate county boundary artifacts when they exist; does not activate counties.

existingToolsRequired.name: V812 county readiness gap resolver
existingToolsRequired.purpose: Recalculate blocked-county gaps without runtime activation.

existingToolsRequired.name: V813 county preparation planner
existingToolsRequired.purpose: Refresh preparation tiers and manual-action recommendations.

existingToolsRequired.name: V814 automation capability audit
existingToolsRequired.purpose: Refresh build-tool capability classification.
